steps.title: Track the dates
steps.content: The first sentence discusses Blake winning a race in August 1929 and says she was already a record breaker. The next sentence shifts to December 1928, which is earlier than the race.

steps.title: Choose the backward shift
steps.content: B would signal contrast, C would signal a later event, and D would signal cause and effect. The blank needs a time transition showing that the 1928 record came before the 1929 race. The answer is A.
